summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PI/Quotation Module and Incentive Tracking System. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - Quotations list, form, public view, PDF download, pending action queue, My Incentives, and Admin Incentives pages all load correctly with proper functionality.

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: PI/Quotation creation requires 'name' field in items - frontend correctly provides this from SKU selection
Public PI view correctly shows Download PDF button and approval/rejection buttons
PDF generation using weasyprint is working correctly (verified via API test)
Incentive configuration supports both fixed and percentage-based incentives
Bulk approve and mark paid functionality working for admin
My Incentives page shows performance overview with monthly trend
PI Pending Action page correctly categorizes approved PIs by stock availability
seed_data_creation: Created test quotations (TEST_Customer_V35, TEST_Reject_Customer) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PI/Quotation and Incentive modules fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/quotations (create), POST /api/quotations/{id}/send (send and lock), GET /api/pi/view/{token} (public view), GET /api/pi/pdf/{token} (PDF download), POST /api/pi/approve/{token} (customer approval), POST /api/pi/reject/{token} (customer rejection), POST /api/quotations/{id}/convert (convert to dispatch/production), GET /api/quotations/pending-action (accountant queue), GET /api/my-incentives (call support view), GET /api/admin/incentives (admin view), POST /api/admin/incentive-config (configure incentives), POST /api/admin/incentives/bulk-approve and bulk-paid (bulk actions). All working correctly.
features_tested: PI/Quotation creation flow - create new quotation with items, customer details
PI list view with filters and stats cards (Total: 7, Pending: 1, Approved: 4, Conversion Rate: 80%)
PI send functionality - marks PI as sent and locks it, returns share link
Public PI view page - shows quotation details with Download PDF button
PDF generation using weasyprint - verified PDF downloads correctly (application/pdf content type)
Customer approval flow via public link - POST /api/pi/approve/{token}
Customer rejection flow via public link - POST /api/pi/reject/{token}
PI Pending Action queue for accountants - shows approved PIs categorized by stock availability
Incentive configuration - fixed (Rs.500) or percentage based
My Incentives page for Call Support role - shows performance overview and history
Admin Incentives page - summary, transactions, configuration tabs
Bulk approve and mark paid for incentives

frontend_ui_tests.quotations_list_page: PASS - Shows 7 quotations with stats cards
frontend_ui_tests.quotation_form_page: PASS - Firm selection and customer inputs found
frontend_ui_tests.public_pi_view: PASS - Shows PI details with Download PDF button
frontend_ui_tests.my_incentives_page: PASS - Shows performance overview and history
frontend_ui_tests.incentive_config_dialog: PASS - Opens correctly with form fields

api_response_notes.send_quotation: Returns {success: true, share_link: '...', quotation_number: '...'} instead of {status: 'sent'}
